creator: stef@scaleengine.com
text:
Update to current version 1.6.8

Fix: PORTNAME=      gdnsd
-PORTVERSION=   1.6.7
+PORTVERSION=   1.6.8
 CATEGORIES=    dns
-MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE}

 MAINTAINER=    ports@scaleengine.com
-WWW: http://code.google.com/p/gdnsd/
+WWW: https://github.com/blblack/gdnsd/
